researchQuestion: Can a minimal GBD Results-style export be traced from query dimensions to derived burden claims without being treated as a final manuscript topic?
targetStatement: This fixture-only GBD demo preserves release, version, query dimensions, metric type, uncertainty intervals, and reuse/citation boundaries for workflow validation only.
scopeBoundary: Fixture-only repository scaffold. Real manuscript work has moved to examples/gbd-cvd-china-global-instance/. Do not infer causality, mechanisms, clinical diagnoses, intervention effects, or country-specific policy conclusions from this default global all-cause endpoint.

claimDispositionPolicy.internal-retain: May remain in the repository as a traceability or teaching check, but must not be used as a manuscript result.
claimDispositionPolicy.candidate-manuscript-claim: May be drafted as a manuscript claim only after citation, reuse, query profile, uncertainty interval, and journal-specific wording gates pass.
claimDispositionPolicy.upgrade-before-submission: Must be replaced, removed, or promoted with source-complete evidence before real manuscript submission.

claims.interpretationBoundary: Teaching fixture retained only to test traceability; not a manuscript result.
Teaching fixture retained only to test traceability; not a manuscript result.
Internal arithmetic check for fixture reproducibility; not an epidemiologic interpretation.

claims.expectedText: workflow fixture, not a publishable disease-burden estimate
claims.interpretationBoundary: Required repository boundary explaining why fixture rows are not manuscript claims.

claims.metricBoundary: Number estimate only; do not combine with rate or percent claims without explicit wording.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Fixture-only real default endpoint check retained for traceability; not a manuscript result after CVD targeted scaffold selection.

claims.metricBoundary: Number estimate only; DALY interpretation must remain descriptive unless a manuscript-specific analytic frame is added.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Fixture-only real default endpoint check retained for traceability; not a manuscript result after CVD targeted scaffold selection.

claims.expectedText: a -17.14% relative change in the endpoint's rate scale
claims.metricBoundary: Derived from endpoint rate values; not age-standardized and not a causal trend explanation.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Fixture-only real default endpoint trend check retained for traceability; not a manuscript result after CVD targeted scaffold selection.

claims.expectedText: A submission-ready GBD manuscript still requires source citation
claims.interpretationBoundary: Retained as a repository boundary explaining why all-cause default endpoint claims are no longer promoted beyond fixture-only status.
